reviews.review_description: I'm playing this game for improving my clay skills and seems it's working because phisiqse are very close to real life. Only thinks is about give the chance to create a camp that is able to play 3 single and one double instead of one single with 2 double only

Never write reviews but has an average sporting Clay shooter who's recently got into registered events the game is amazing. Really helps me to get my eyes right and identify lead. I do wish there was more customization on the guns. I shoot a 10 mm mid rib for my clays gun. I wish the game had more rib options to give me more of a realistic look for my particular gun. Even even offering more gun mods as DLC I would purchase, the game is that good.

So ive had this game for close to 6 months now.  I got the hang of it and ended up being pretty decent at skeet shooting in VR.  Finally went to skeet shoot in Real Reality and hit nearly every clay for 3 straight hours.  I might just be a natural, but i wont lie when I say this game actually helped me.  Pretty rare these days.  5 stars.

developer_response.body: Awesome! Thanks for sharing.

reviews.review_description: I started clay shooting in real life in November 2025, did 3 boxes of 25 every weekend ( 0.8 CAD per shoot with plate). Results where between 5 and 12 of 25. Then I got this game, built my own stock, shoot around 4k rounds in the game. Now I got better reaction time, leading, second eye opened technique and shoot 17-20 out of 25 in real life. Worth every dollar!

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your results, great to hear!

reviews.review_description:
I had and played this game on
 my mobile device for years. Now I finally could bye myvr headset after saving for a couple of years.
 I did manage to buy the game, just wish it wasn't so expensive.
 I love the game .
 If you are into trap shooting in real life.
 then you absolutely need to purchase this game.
 It is a bit expensive but there is a lot of play on it for the price.
  Absolute ace of a game.
 Thank you.

developer_response.body: Welcome! Nice to hear you came from mobile! We try to keep the pricing so that it's affordable but also makes serving and reaching the shooting audience sustainable. There's more to come!

reviews.review_description: I use this shotgun simulator along with the MegaVR Simstock, and can emphatically attest to its training effectiveness. It has transformed my real-world shooting; this last pheasant-shooting season was incredibly successful thanks to this excellent product. I pulled off some truly impressive shots - to the shock and envy of other guns - and it was all thanks to Clay Hunt VR and the MegaVR Simstock. Additionally, I shoot with a side-by-side 12 gauge, and the developer - upon my request - was very quick to amend the in-game software to cater for a 28” barrel length. This made the simulator even more realistic. This is a very cost-effective way to train! I cannot wait for further updates! Keep them coming.

developer_response.body: Great to hear and thank you for your feedback and suggestion!

reviews.review_description: Brilliant game. Would be awsome with a mixed reality mode. Would love to place the launchers where you want in field for target shooting

Should make the duck hunting where you are in a A-frame duck blind for duck hunting mode where your avatar calls in the ducks with a duck call and with duck decoys in front of the blind and when you kill a duck the duck dog goes and retrieves the duck,should add a goose hunting mode where you are in a layout blind with geese decoys in front of you and you can call in the geese and shoot them when landing ,im a waterfowl hunter and this would make me play the game more and make the goose hunting mode if created free and just update duck hunting please send and thank you.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the suggestion!

reviews.review_title: If I can give it 500/5 I would.
reviews.review_description:
Clay Hunt VR has changed the way I train. I shoot sporting clays in the USA competitively and I gotta say that with the added creative sporting - training on specific targets that I struggle with becomes so easy, and accessible. It is beyond fun, and I save a ton of money from practicing. 

You can make so many different courses, even the same courses as you would see in competition. 

“The world is your oyster” with creative sporting. Highly recommend getting this for training, also really recommend you getting a VR Gun stock if you don’t have one. (I recommend Texture VR) (please note I am not sponsored, they have a great product!)
All i have to say is that it definetely needs some upgrade cuz it is getting kinda boring.

Where do I start!!, this game is something else, if you have a gun stock and want to improve your real life shooting, you need this setup! I am very new to shooting clays in real life and bought this setup and the improvement has been unbelievable, Ave been keeping up with friends shooting alot longer. You will honestly get a few saying aw it's just a game, trust me it's so much more when paired with a stock!. As for all the people saying no recoil that doesn't matter a whole lot as you building muscle memory for before the recoil even happens in real life shooting.
I was skeptical about it, but decided to try, I love it, next step is to buy a stock

developer_response.body: Great to hear! You're gonna love it even more with a stock!

reviews.review_description: It’s nice but it gets boring pretty fast we need new shotguns it need more realistic and make stuff free fun hunts like turkey hunting and deer hunting but other than then that it alright 3 star

At first I just got it because it looked like the only good hunting game, and because I planned to get a gun stock, but this game is amazing! I have no complaints! I like the hunting mode but shooting clay in this game is easier than I thought! It also mentioned I shot 126 ammo, with it saying “Save money, shoot in VR!” and it was pretty true. This $30 probably paid itself off! I wanted to get GAIM, but it was really expensive and everyone says it’s not a toy, it’s a training simulator, so I decided it’s not for me. I can’t wait to get the gun stock! Another feature I like about it is the fact in clay shooting you can actually yell and clay will shoot up! How cool is that! I’m so happy with it, and I’m sure my stepdad would enjoy it (he likes hunting).
Edit 1: I forgot to mention that this could be a game or a training simulator, so it’s the best of both worlds!
Edit 2:There is a lot to say! My gun stock came, which was fun, but I had a problem with calibrating, the rotating used big increase in rotate, I mean, 0.5?! But anyways, my stepdad sure did enjoy it! And I can officially celebrate 500 shots! Thank you clay hunt for tracking shots, and the game definitely paid itself off!

reviews.review_title: I don’t even Clay Hunt, and still loveit
reviews.review_description:
Idk what it is about this simulation that I love so much and keep returning to, but I love it. I don’t Clay hunt or hunt in real life at all, and never will. Most of the apps I use on my Quest 3 are pretty much 90% simulations though. Other than shooting, I do all the simulations in real life, and am always surprised how accurate it can be sometimes. 

Anyways, I liked this simulation so much, I went and got a gun stock for it. Not a real one. Just a plain, cheap, and light 50 bucks one. I’m never going to know the difference anyways, but having a stock makes a difference on accuracy and on the enjoyment factor. Spent about 5 or 10 minutes to adjust it in game to match it. Really, this app is just really fun!
A goose hunt with birds coming into decoys would be brilliant....

reviews.review_title: Horison+ this months game - jeez- BORING
reviews.review_description: they both are - dull shoting - go play tiny archers not this turd

developer_response.body: The cool thing about Horizon+ is that it has something for everyone. Great that you gave Clay Hunt VR a try.

reviews.review_description: The creative sporting function is not usable. Either there is a black screen when entering the field I created, or when I choose test the stand, I cannot shoot but still stuck in editing mode walking around. This happened with the fields that use the tower and rabbit. Don’t know whether that would be related.

developer_response.body: This is the first time this is reported. Could you contact aleksi@shotgungaming.com so we could sort this out. A video of you walking through your course that has this issue would be helpful. Just having rabbits on towers doesn’t seem to cause the issue.

reviews.review_description: A bit rubbish seeing you have pay top money to go to a decent different level and places

developer_response.body: Hey, thanks for trying Clay Hunt VR! We think it's very cool that with Horizon+, more people will be able to try shotgun sports in virtual reality. Pricing for the add-ons allows us to keep the base game affordable while making it possible to sustainably serve demanding shooting enthusiasts.

reviews.review_description: I shot trap for many years. Unfortunately the cost to reload and shoot a round of trap has gone through the roof. This simulator is is as close as you’re going to get at the range. I still struggle with the hard right targets on station 5, but have improved a great deal using Clays. I would like to see an AR15 type rifle for the wild boars. Doubt anyone is using a shotgun to hunt them. Another minor improvement would br to improve the visibility of the targets when shooting sporting clays. Other than that this game is perfect in every way.

Ive had clay hunt vr for a year now and have to say its been brilliant, the developer engages with users and is continually improving the game. I try to use it daily and can honestly say i enjoy it as much as the real thing..thankyou for such a fantastic product

developer_response.body: Great to hear Clay Hunt VR is part of your routine. There's still a lot of ideas for improvements, thank you for your support!

reviews.review_description: EDIT: I posted earlier that the app had a problem with reloading, but this turned out to be because I had accidentally selected auto reloading and deselecting it fixed the issue. REVIEW: I’m using this with the real stock pro. I’m new to shotguns and I was able to set up my VR gun to match my Benelli SBE3. I’ve been practicing almost every day, and I went to the range a couple weeks ago and my shotgun running had VASTLY improved. Previously I hadn’t been quite mounting the gun correctly, but with my coach at the range showing me the right way, and the vr practice I had been doing, I went from a hopeless beginner missing everything, to a decent beginner who can actually break TONS of clays in five stand in real life! I want to do upland and duck hunting, and I love practicing in this app. My vr gun stock bumps my volume down so I just have a glass of wine, put on some Queen in the background, and bust some clays. I love the hunting sims too. This app is the bomb and I would recommend it to new and intermediate shooters as a valid skill builder with the real stock pro set up like your real shotgun. It was worth the money. The clay shooting range is an hour away for me and I wouldn’t be this improved right now without it. Huge thanks to the developers.

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing, and great to hear the issue is resolved. Congratulations on your progress at the range! It’s inspiring to hear how VR practice and real-life coaching are paying off - keep up the great work!

reviews.review_title: Clay Hunt VR as a Training Tool
reviews.review_description: Clay Hunt VR is an amazing tool with its full shot analysis. It’s been over 25 years since I shot sporting clay’s. When I started shooting again a month and a half ago, I shot a 35. After two weeks of using Clay Hunt VR as a training tool I shot a 51. It’s been a little over a month now that I have been using Clay Hunt VR for about an hour a day and I shot a 73. This is the best training tool out there and a lot cheaper than going to the range.

developer_response.body: Thank you! Great to hear about your progress and that you are back shooting!

reviews.review_description:
One of my most used apps. I have made a DIY stock, and the experience feels realistic. 
My real life trap shooting have improved a lot during the last year I have trained on my Quest.
Can’t match virtual gun to physical gun…. The  adjustment system doesn’t do anything.What am I doing wrong?

developer_response.body: Did you get it working? I can confirm that the gun stock adjustments work. Have you enabled the gun stock mode and are now editing the offsets? Try settings large offset values (for example 40 degrees rotation). There are also preset buttons for the Real stock pro and Simstock. Please see the getting started video at www.clayhuntvr.com. For further assistance, please contact aleksi@shotgungaming.com.

reviews.review_description: Recently got into clay shooting after doing an experience day and decided to go for my shotgun licence. Knowing how long this can take I joined a gun club and have booked lessons. In the meantime I saw a review for this game in a Clay shooting magazine and thought it sounded like a good idea to improve my shooting until I go ‘live’ I bought a meta quest 3s and downloaded Clay hunt vr and I have to say it’s brilliant. I have been using with just the controllers but have just forked out on the clay blaster to use as a stock which I am hoping will improve the experience further. Highly recommend it’s such good fun.

Archery has been my sport for over 60yrs and I've participated in smallbore rifle shooting but never took to the shotgun because I've always considered splattering pellets everywhere not very precise.

That said, I thought I'd give this 'game' a try for a bit of fun. Wow what fun. I've been playing this for a couple of months now and it's changed my opinion of clay shooting. I haven't gone as far as getting a gun stock as I feel I really don't need to as holding a virtual gun is very realistic. I haven't enjoyed myself so much in ages. OK, while not having the weight of a gun or the recoil, after an hour or two shooting I'm exhausted. It really is quite tiring.

This has got to be the next best thing to actually being out on a shoot. I can highly recommend this game/app or whatever you want to call it. Well worth the money.

Update after seven months.

Got myself the MegaVR Simstock to go with this 'game', although it's more than a game. What a transformation. Anyone wanting realism needs to get a good gunstock. I realise it's a costly addition but believe me it's worth it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for this feedback! It's great to hear how you enjoy Clay Hunt VR and MegaVR Simstock!

reviews.review_description: As a 12 year student lad trap shooter shooting average 39 this game improved my shooting to 45+ and the hunting is very good too worth the money
Best game!  Thanks to the developers!
Create a realistic duck and goose hunting experience please…that would be absolutely amazing!!!!

amazing game /simulator ,finnaly found
 a stock on ebay ,all i play ,just started clay shooting ,have bin once a month for just over a year ,so maybe 14 times ,people at club think im a natural as iv come on so quick ,not said owt 😂but this game is the reason why!

developer_response.body: Thank you! Of course we would appreciate if you would share your secret to your friends at the club :D

reviews.review_description:
Yet another game done right, kudos to the developers. What an enjoyable experience that anyone can participate in. Mucho praise for creating a shooting game where the standard controllers are EXCELLENT in playing the game. So this goes from novice (me) to professional shooters and with the option to use (if you want them) purchasing the 
 highest level of manufactured, actual wood stocked guns designed for this game - Wowwww!

An excellent way to practise when you can't get to the range.
To me it is very real and almost as good as the real thing - except there is no recoil.
The only difference I see is the field of view/peripheral vision is less than real life, but I suspect this is more of a Q3 thing than the software.
The shot feedback shows you where you are on a target and allows you to find tune your mechanics as required.
I wish I had this year's ago
Great game helped me alot

I shoot clay and I see this not as a game but serious practice. I 3d printed a gunstock that feels right just lighter, I’m seriously considering spending some money on one of the commercial offerings with realistic weight. The after shot analysis is excellent I can see my mistakes and because there is no cost I can try different techniques. before I may not have wasted the clay and ammo if I had a technique that was working. I’m finding swing through works well for me on certain presentations, arcing targets I’m experimenting with interception. I can see my improvement after 4k rounds within vr. It remains to be seen if it improves my real game but I would be very surprised if it didn’t. Excellent software and great support in WhatsApp. I recommend this for any clay shooter

With DIY Real Stock Pro V2 for me an absolutely realistc way to train clay shooting at any time.
💯👍
Just got this game and although have only tried it once, I'm loving it!

developer_response.body: Awesome! Thank you!

reviews.review_description:
Good game, really impressed and got me gripped.

Would have given it a 5 star if not for the extras and pricing of the packs you need to purchase to open up all of the game.
The amount I can practice clay shooting with my metaquest 3s and the real vr stock pro 2 pays for itself after a few days. I'm not paid to write that.

I went back-and-forth because of the initial investment but my only regret is not pulling the trigger sooner. I also purchased the Real Stock Pro V3 Ultimate Black Series and haven’t looked back. It has paid for itself 20x’s over and I can practice as much as I want without the cost of shells, gas, travel time or club fees. 

The game helps with muscle memory and you can work on the weak parts of your game, and more importantly build confidence. I also really enjoy creating the custom 5-stand’s to mimic your local courses or birds you want to practice. You can also shoot in a private group with your buddies.

I had created a some bad habits the past couple years and have been able to work on them through the game. After a couple months I was able to get my mechanics and fundamentals back which has improved my consistency and increased my scores. I’m also having fun again and owe it all to the game.

The developers have done an outstanding job making it realistic and constantly introducing upgrades. Thank you for bringing the game we love to life in VR!
Fantastic game. I would like to see more rifles and sniper shooting.
Love this ! I just can't stop playing it.
When I try to shoot in the game, the gun is jerking around and doesn't track at all making it impossible for me to shoot accurately

developer_response.body: There are few things that can go wrong with tracking. It's related to the headset mostly so you can find information about tracking issues online or there are several discussions in the Clay Hunt VR Facebook group. One common issue in Clay Hunt VR specifically is that you use a gun stock with Quest 3 and use both controllers for tracking. It's recommended that you set the secondary controller disabled in the Clay Hunt VR gun stock settings when using Q3.  For further support, please reach us through mail or seek help from Clay Hunt VR Facebook Group with further details like what headset you are using and if you are using a gun stock.

reviews.review_description: I am new to this game and I already love it but I have  some decent ideas. This game is one of best games for that you can get for training of hunting or skeet/trap. But for more things like this would be a crows bow for hunting deer and more scopes like 2x zoom or a 6x zoom. Deer hunting mode wich would be a calm mode were you would have too spot like 5 deer per round and shoot some like boar shooting but they would be still in till you shoot at them . To spot them it would be like to move around the map and then see were they are you would have also meter/yard to see how far they are.

reviews.review_title: Clay Hunt VR – A Must-Have for Serious S
reviews.review_description:
As a hunter and avid shooter, Clay Hunt VR is an incredible tool that lets me scratch the itch year-round. Whether I’m in the mood to bust clays or simulate a hunt, this game allows me to do it 365 days a year, right from my living room.

One of my favorite features is the instant feedback for both hits and misses when shooting clays. It’s a great way to fine-tune your lead and follow-through. While you don’t need a factory-made simulated shotgun stock, I’ll say this — adding one takes the realism to another level. The feel and handling become much more immersive and authentic.

That said, the game isn’t without limitations, especially in the hunting scenarios. For example:

Ducks always fly away — they never come in to land or approach from different angles.

You can’t call or decoy them in — the ducks just take off and fly, and you're reliant on the dog flushing them as if you were upland hunting.

It’s got a bit of a nostalgic vibe — like a modern-day Duck Hunt from the 1980s, just with more polish and realism.

What would take this to the next level? A realistic goose hunting mode. Picture this: sitting in a simulated layout blind, hearing birds work the spread, rising up at the perfect moment, and pulling off a triple. That’s the kind of immersive feature that would push this game from great to truly elite.

Overall, Clay Hunt VR is a fantastic training and entertainment tool for real-world shooters. It’s fun, addictive, and surprisingly helpful in keeping your eye sharp — even off-season.

reviews.review_title: Love it but please add goose hunting :0)
reviews.review_description:
Love this game! Especially after I got the Real Stock Pro by TextureVR.
Variety of shooting disciplines is great.
The only one I miss is goose hunting. 
Developers, please add goose hunting!!!
Also, would be great to have protected animals in the hunting challenges so you get points taken away or fail the game if you shoot a protected species.

I've only had this app for one week, been shooting for over 35 years, this is so realistic, not only the clay shooting but the game shooting is spot on, would love to see a driven grouse add on, stood in a stone butt on a grouse Moor.
Used with a sim stock this is a brilliant tool to improve your real-world shooting. The developer has clearly put a lot of work into the app. Recommended.

This is a game changer.  I shoot quite a bit of. ATA. ￼   and at my local club.    I bought a texture. V3 stock set it up, exactly like my competition shotgun.    How realistic is this? You may ask I’m shooting my average scores the same that I do in real life on the game. Or shall we say the simulator?   Two thumbs up.
   
Only thing I can’t get my mic to work on with this simulator call for the bird. ￼  my microphone works with everything else except this ￼ not sure what I’m doing wrong

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind feedback! You need to give the app permission to use microphone. It seems that Clay Hunt VR is denied to ask for it so you need to do it in the application settings in the device settings side.

reviews.review_description: If you purchase a good stock (texture vr, we have had good luck with). Take the time to set the stock up to match your real shotgun, and set up the virtual shotgun properly (visual component). This becomes an amazing tool. My real life trap, skeet and sporting clays scores have improved as well as my consistency.  With the real life price of shells and clays. It does not take long to recover the cost of this system

This simulator is very good and provides good practice for real shooting. This is a game that I highly recommend.

If possible, it would be nice to be able to choose some of the real shooting ranges as the background.

Thank you to the developer. Also, thank you to the creator of realstock.
from Japan
The game is so fun but the downside is that it gets boring because your doing the same court unless you don’t pay for the Forrest or lakeside court. But besides good training.
This is definitely the best VR app for shotgun sports training.

Made my own stock but word to the wise I wouldnt make it as heavy as your real shotgun to much on your back lol. Just wish you didn't have to unlock the courses just let us shoot them seems to take forever. I only shoot the sporting clays at this point and feel I do pretty good but still seems to take way to long to unlock new courses but only been shooting it for like 3 days but so looking forward to the next coarse. Love this game highly highly recommend.

We got the texture vr gun, and matched it to our real shotguns and this app allowed us to practice whenever! The course builder is amazing to allow us to build layouts and help-us get practice in our week areas! The game and Vr gun has paid for itself in one day of shooting!
My friend can't pay for the game

developer_response.body: There might be restrictions with your friends bank. Please consider alternative payment methods like gift cards or Meta Credits. For further assistance with payments, please contact Meta support.

reviews.review_description: This brought back a lot of fond memories hunting ducks and quail. It’s extremely well done! Easily the best bird hunting on a computer!

reviews.review_title: Best shooting simulator in the market
reviews.review_description:
I really love this simulator. I tried each clay shooting game in the market and this is the most realistic for me. Also the multiplayer is great and works really good.
I will change my rate to five stars because it is awesome, even if it does not have “helice shooting” mode yet, which is what I practice in real life.

Please add Helice shooting!! (sporting hunt is really nice but we need an actual Helice Ring!)

The game is so good! If you shoot and want/need the practice, this is an absolute no brainer. 

The developer is all over the discord and super open to feedback (ways to improve the game and making it even more realistic). His updates are proving how committed he is to listening to the community. I’m so impressed and the price is super generous for what you get. Best VR app on meta store IMHO. Well done 5 stars!!

developer_response.body: Thank you! It's awesome how far Clay Hunt VR has come with the active community and there's still a lot of updates coming.

reviews.review_description: While browsing YouTube for trap shooting tips, I stumbled across Clay Hunter via a review through Target Focused Life. It sounded exciting and since I live in a colder winter climate, I figured I’d jump into the VR world and give this a shot to keep my skills up in the off season. Wow, am I impressed! The game is easy to operate and very realistic. Definitely get the V3 gun stock as it is most realistic. I am seriously addicted to this game. Great work!

I am a novice shooter and wanted to improve my skills as much as possible. I purchased the Texture VR Stock to help make the experience more realistic. If you are buying this game for fun then using the controller is fine, but if you want to improve your shooting then you have to get a rifle stock. The game is really immersive & definitely helps me gets me to go through my drills - ensuring I think about my feet, core, break point, hold point & focus point on each shot. Realistic & also a lot of fun (you can play with 5 buddies online) . I can now regularly hit 25 on advanced Trap & have moved on to sporting Clays. Highly recommended-you will love this game.
Amazing. Great for training
This game is great. I love unlocking new guns and mods. Definitely should get if you are in to hunting/ skeet shooting.

An amazing simulator! I am a skeet shooter and was quite sceptical at first, but after seeing the review on YouTube at Target Focused Life, I went for it. Absolutely no regrets. I use the Quest 3 and Real Stock Pro V3.
 For the developers: for skeet is it possible to add a doubles option for stations 3,4 and 5?I was hoping to practice eye shift at these stations. Also, an option  for 20g, 28g and 410 bore would be awesome.

Dear developers, is it possible to move the shooting positions in the creative mode?
That way we could build and simulate our local shooting site, so we could practice that too.
Also an online database would be amazing!
What a game, so close to the real thing it is truly fantastic.

Great trainer when paired with the V3 textured stock pro. Only thing that would be nice is the ability to change which barrel fires first, unless I haven’t figured that out yet. 

Being able to create my own 5 stand course is a godsend. I create a course to work on targets that gives me fits. 

Overall 5 stars

reviews.review_title: By far the best clay shooting simulator
reviews.review_description: Great simulator, I hesitate to call it a game, because it’s far beyond that, the trap is trap, the skeet is realistic, but where it really shines is the sporting clays, has helped me up my game in real life. And a HUGE bonus there is a build your own 5 stand range which is phenomenal!  If you’re looking for a true simulator for clay shooting look no further.
Just getting started with mine, fine tunning my gun fit at the moment. It's an amazing piece of kit. I'm a shooting instructor/coach this will definitely help clients develop their shooting skills. 👍
I love this game for practing my shooting even when  not at the range, it's very good to keep my skill consistent.
Great game as Close as real life

reviews.review_title: Great but the hogs dont die
reviews.review_description: Clays are excellent and Every thing works except the add ons... the animals wont die for some reason ?!?! Quite annoying actually after paying the extra

developer_response.body: UPDATE: There's now difficulty setting for Boar Hunt. Try it with the beginner difficulty and here's some more tips: try to hit the heart at the side of the animal or head. When using a shotgun remember to lead. Semi-auto shotgun helps a lot to get the hang of it! With rifle, you can chamber a round easier by pushing the thumb stick up.

reviews.review_description:
UPDATE:
The developer got right back to me - much appreciated - I had missed the choke selector and it’s perfect!

(I’d still like to see the functionality to adjust the oscillation in American trap though. ;)


Original Post:
I recently purchased this product. I’m quite pleased and would definitely recommend this to other shotgun enthusiasts. 

It is easier than real life however (you don’t have to be as “on” the target to break the target as in real life). I’d like to see a way to vary the degree of difficulty in that respect. Perhaps picking your choke so that you can adjust your pattern size/degree of difficulty?

Also the American trap has limited oscillation. It’s a lot like the training/beginner trap you’d experience at your local club. It would be nice to see a setting for full oscillation so that it mirrors an ATA competition experience. That would make for a much more valuable training tool. 

Thanks developers for a great product and thanks in advance for considering my suggestions.

developer_response.body: Thank you for feedback! You can choose for example full choke in the gun settings. Setting for oscillation is a good suggestion!

reviews.review_description:
Hi Clay Hunter Developer,

For all riffels, provide Auto-load of amunation or atlest avoid  "Pump rapidly" step as it take away fun of playing..

In training,the counter shows 6/6 and you fire, NO SHOT and you pump again and withaout fire counter step down to 5/6. Again you pump and counter become 4/6 and no fire!

In training, in spite of making the game more realistic, I would suggest adding an Auto-pumping option in training settings, and you should be ready to fire as soon as all bullets are loaded. This can be done for rifles, which is default in training.

We all play games for pleasure, please allow us to have it...

Regards
Kesh Patel
Australia
Simply put, this game is great. It’s been a long time since I about skeet and now that appears to be all I want to do!  Excellent game with multiple options to play.

reviews.review_title: Good game but issues, please read.
reviews.review_description:
I’m in the UK and it’s hard to get the real stock pro so I decided to 3D print my own which is great. I’d imagine with the real thing this would be amazing. The game itself is awesome. I have to keep enabling and disabling the voice as it constantly stops working. Hopefully they will release some graphics updates for the Q3 in the future. All in all myself and my 10yr old love playing this so if your on the fence about it, buy it. You won’t regret it. 

Update, 

Just brought the boar hunting add on £5.99. Went to try it but no rifle 🤷‍♀️. Found out you need 5000xp in order to buy the rifle. That was not stated in the purchase. 5000xp will take ages as you only get so much per session unless you play highest difficulty to get more but if not very good it’s useless. You can buy a 10k xp add on for £7.99 but why should I do this? I feel kind of ripped off now tbh. I don’t mind paying for DLC but should get what I paid for. So for this I only give it 4 stars now rather than 5.

Update 2

Have seen the development team say they have removed the xp requirement for the rifle. I’m looking forward to to trying later after work. If this is the case it will be returning to 5* 
Thanks team. Great response. Looking forward to future DLC and updates.

developer_response.body: Thanks again for your feedback!

reviews.review_description:
I'm not a hunter in real life and would never kill animals, but I do enjoy this game. 

The only problem I found and the reason I only gave it 3 stars was the price. I have over 400 games and this was the most expensive.   $35 is the base price and then they had three add ons for $5 each. Making it $50 total.

If the $35 included the three paid locations I would have given this game a 4 star rating.

If the game was $25 and included the three extra add ons I would have given this a 5 star rating. 

I do hope they add more animals like deer and not charge those who paid the full price to make this a value game.

developer_response.body: Glad to hear you enjoy the game! We get also a lot of feedback that the game is too cheap for the value and if the price would be too low, we wouldn't be able to serve the ever growing community with updates.

reviews.review_description: I recently bought the forest course add-on. When I go to click on it, it loads but then sends me straight back to the home screen?

developer_response.body: Something might have went wrong with the purchase as the game checks whether you have purchased the add-on after loading the add-on. Have you tried restarting the device and checked that the internet connection is working?

reviews.review_description:
I bought the game and started playing and just can't stop. 

I was wondering what and when the next update involves as I would like to see the virtual reality side meaning more detail to the birds and ground/trees. Also classic duck shooting mabey driven or just shooting duck of shore on a lough. 

The detail to the actual shooting side is spot on gaving each different bird the different leads to each different distance outstanding...
I wish they had more species of birds to shoot besides just pigeons, but other than that it’s been really fun so far!

developer_response.body: Thank you! We'll be adding more species of birds!
